note: Per-prediction @peterxing signals are refreshed hourly from the authenticated X API first, then a live read-only public RSS profile. Caches older than 36 hours and stale legacy syndication snapshots are rejected rather than labeled current. Controlled semantic concepts supplement literal matching, but claim-specific facet guards remain mandatory and semantic-only matches are limited to 30 days. Assignment maximizes unique relevant posts before bounded reuse of at most 3; unsupported predictions receive an honest live from:peterxing search. The Reality Signals grid follows the same fresh source.
